ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., CSV file, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the dataset */,
  "source_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "x1" REAL /* Value of variable x1 */,
  "x2" REAL /* Value of variable x2 */,
  "x3" REAL /* Value of variable x3 */,
  "x4" REAL /* Value of variable x4 */,
  "y1" REAL /* Value of variable y1 */,
  "y2" REAL /* Value of variable y2 */,
  "y3" REAL /* Value of variable y3 */,
  "y4" REAL /* Value of variable y4 */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was recorded */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Source identifier for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the transformation was applied to */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation */,
  "transformation_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken during the transformation process */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date the transformation was applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the transformation */,
  "transformation_status" TEXT /* Status of the transformation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the transformation failed */,
  "transformation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the transformation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis result */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the analysis failed */,
  "analysis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the analysis process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization was created from */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, bar chart) */,
  "vis_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "vis_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "vis_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "vis_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the visualization failed */,
  "vis_duration" REAL /* Duration of the visualization process */,
  "vis_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, business analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the comment is associated with (e.g., dataset_id, result_id) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity the comment is associated with (e.g., dataset, analysis) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if the comment is a reply */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
